span_mappings.nl_span: For finite sets, the cardinality of the union plus the cardinality of the intersection equals the sum of the two cardinalities

formal_statement: theorem qa_mathlib13_finset_card_union_inter {α : Type u} [DecidableEq α] (s t : Finset α) : (s ∪ t).card + (s ∩ t).card = s.card + t.card
natural_language_claim: For finite sets, the cardinality of the union plus the cardinality of the intersection equals the sum of the two cardinalities.
